title: Front Door Skills
description: Start here when the request is broad, needs triage, or should route through the shortest high-signal entry point.

title: Core Patterns And Models
description: Use these when the work involves @Table models, property wrappers, database setup, migrations, or query patterns.

title: CloudKit Sync And Sharing
description: Use these when the work involves SyncEngine, CloudKit integration, sharing, or sync metadata.

title: API Reference
description: Use these for direct API and type signatures when you already know the stack.

title: Troubleshooting And Diagnostics
description: Use these for symptom-first debugging of errors, crashes, sync failures, and migration issues.
